description: A book illustration showing a figure seated on a stone balustrade or terrace at night, leaning back and gazing at a dark sky over a densely wooded hillside. The figure wears light-colored garments and appears to be resting or contemplating. Stone baluster pillars frame the terrace. Below the illustration, a text block contains Czech verse numbered 'I.' with several stanzas. The night sky is rendered in deep blues and greens with dark foliage below.
